decisionContext.reason: VCPChat exposes CodexRouterHost, but normal chat send still calls chatManager.handleSendMessage and direct CLI/Desktop paths are unmanaged unless wrapped.

candidatePaths.summary: Keep current state and document router as available but not mandatory.
candidatePaths.benefit: Lowest risk; no runtime behavior change.
candidatePaths.fit: Useful as a checkpoint, insufficient for user-visible governed action.

candidatePaths.summary: Add a narrow user-visible Codex task path in VCPChat that builds a codex-router task envelope and calls codexRouterHostClient.run.
candidatePaths.benefit: Creates a real governed action without hijacking ordinary chat semantics.
candidatePaths.risk: Medium; touches renderer/chat send flow but can be gated by an explicit prefix or command.
candidatePaths.reversibility: High; remove the command branch and normal chat path remains intact.
candidatePaths.validationCost: node --check for touched JS files, npm run build if available, and a renderer/control-path smoke.
candidatePaths.fit: Best fit for current evidence and project governance.

candidatePaths.summary: Route every normal VCPChat send through codex-router.
candidatePaths.risk: High; codex-router is a desktop task governance host, not a drop-in chat completion proxy.
candidatePaths.reversibility: Medium; broad behavior change could disrupt streaming, attachments, topics, and group chat.
candidatePaths.validationCost: High; full VCPChat interactive regression required.

candidatePaths.summary: Treat codex-cli-host as the governed surface and leave VCPChat UI unchanged.
candidatePaths.benefit: Good for CLI acceptance and bounded write smoke.
candidatePaths.risk: Does not make VCPChat user-visible actions governed.
candidatePaths.validationCost: Existing CLI smoke coverage plus wrapper tests.

draftPatch.applyCheck: passed with git -C A:/VCP/VCPChat_native_host apply --check before application

proposedBehavior.trigger: An explicit user command such as /codex-router or /codex-task at the start of the message.
proposedBehavior.normalChat: Unchanged; non-matching messages continue through chatManager.handleSendMessage.
proposedBehavior.routerPath: The renderer builds a task envelope from current input and calls window.codexRouterHostClient.run(task).
proposedBehavior.fallback: If codexRouterHostClient is unavailable, show a clear UI error and do not silently fall back to unmanaged execution for the governed command.
proposedBehavior.acceptanceLabel: explicit governed Codex task entry, not global mandatory governance for all chat

preEditRealityCheck.targetWorktree: dirty before this packet with pre-existing docs/untracked changes
preEditRealityCheck.instruction: Do not touch or revert pre-existing user-owned changes.

validationPlan: fresh VCPChat Electron or DesktopRemote smoke for the explicit command path
notInScope: Moving branches, pushing, merging, releasing, or deploying
approvalQuestion: Approve editing A:/VCP/VCPChat_native_host to add the explicit governed Codex task entry?
